valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Fri 08 May 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Sat 09 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low Bailey 997 expected Norwegian Sea 1000 by 1800 Friday. Low 300 miles west of FitzRoy 1002 expected 150 miles west of Trafalgar 997 by same time. New low expected FitzRoy 1006 by that time. High Norway 1020 expected Baltic sea 1028 by 1800 Friday
